purpose: Compare the attached weekly brand performance workbook with Codex read-only sources for the same coffee reporting window and classify causes of differences.

codex_best_available_composite.selfmall_source: VM Cloud NPay read-only + operating DB Toss read-only
codex_best_available_composite.coupang_source: Coupang revenue-history read-only when available; ordersheets only as reference
codex_best_available_composite.ad_spend_source: VM Cloud Meta site-summary read-only; Naver/Coupang ad spend not yet attached for this historical window

naver_or_smartstore.source: operating DB public.tb_playauto_orders, shop_name='스마트스토어', amount pay_amt

selfmall.source: operating DB public.tb_sales_toss + VM Cloud SQLite imweb_orders NPay read-only

naver.reason: Naver Search Ad API/Display Hermes source is not attached for 2026-04-25 - 2026-05-01.

coupang.reason: Coupang Ads source is not attached to the no-send generator.

customer_mix.reason: Current reporting JSON does not output repeat/new customer metrics yet.

sales_difference_table.cause_summary: Codex uses PlayAuto pay_amt with COALESCE(pay_time, ord_time). The workbook likely includes two additional Naver rows or a different adjustment basis worth 65,800 KRW.

sales_difference_table.count_or_rows_gap: attachment 128 orders vs Codex Toss 62 rows + VM NPay 60 rows
sales_difference_table.cause_summary: Codex combines Toss net amount and VM Cloud NPay actual. The workbook likely uses a fuller selfmall order sheet or includes another payment/adjustment bucket not represented by Toss+NPay split.

sales_difference_table.count_or_rows_gap: attachment 56 orders vs Codex revenue-history 33 coffee rows / 34 quantity
sales_difference_table.cause_summary: Codex strict source uses Coupang revenue-history coffee_hint saleAmount by recognition date. The workbook appears to use a different Coupang sales source or manual channel total. This is the largest sales gap.
84.2% of the total sales gap comes from Coupang, 10.2% from selfmall, and 5.6% from Smartstore/Naver.

ad_difference_table.cause_summary: Workbook uses formula 217,890 + 1,540,000/4. Codex does not yet have a Naver ad source/export for 2026-04-25 - 2026-05-01.
Meta/selfmall ad spend, platform conversion revenue, and clicks match exactly.
Workbook subtracts TeamKeto-side 18,452 KRW from account-level 533,164 KRW. Codex no-send generator has no Coupang Ads source attached.
The entire spend gap is explained by Naver 602,890 KRW and Coupang 514,712 KRW missing from current Codex no-send input.

customer_mix_difference.cause_summary: The workbook has channel-level new/repeat customer counts. Codex currently does not output comparable customer-level repeat metrics in the Slack no-send JSON.

recommended_next_actions.action: Create a matching-source reconciliation for Coupang 2026-04-25 - 2026-05-01.
recommended_next_actions.why: Coupang explains 84.2% of the sales gap.
recommended_next_actions.success_criteria: Identify whether the workbook's 2,100,400 KRW comes from ordersheets, revenue-history, settlement, ad conversion report, or manual upload.

recommended_next_actions.action: Acquire Naver display/search export for 2026-04-25 - 2026-05-01 if the workbook rule should be automated.
recommended_next_actions.why: Current Codex report has Naver ad spend 0 KRW while workbook uses 602,890 KRW.
recommended_next_actions.lane: Green read-only download once Hermes runs it
recommended_next_actions.success_criteria: Naver spend, conversion revenue, and clicks can be reproduced without manual formula.

recommended_next_actions.action: Add a report input layer for manual allocation rules only after TJ approves the rule.
recommended_next_actions.why: Workbook has formulas that allocate or subtract values. These should be explicit inputs, not hidden code assumptions.
recommended_next_actions.lane: Green design, Yellow only if cache/write is requested
recommended_next_actions.success_criteria: Naver 1540000/4 and Coupang account-minus-teamketo rules are visible in JSON as named assumptions.
